_comment: This is a placeholder. Build the actual pipeline visually in VS Code using the RocketRide extension.
_instructions: 1. Install the RocketRide extension in VS Code
2. Open this file - it will render in the visual pipeline builder
3. Add nodes: Source (webhook) → Image → LLM (Google Gemini) → Output
4. Configure the Gemini LLM node with the analysis prompt from backend/gemini_client.py
5. Set the source node to accept image input via webhook
6. Wire the output to return structured JSON

pipeline.name: ADA Compliance Auditor
pipeline.description: Analyzes photos of buildings and public spaces for ADA accessibility violations using Gemini Vision

config.description: Receives image upload from web frontend

config.system_prompt: You are an expert ADA compliance auditor. Analyze the image for accessibility violations and return structured JSON.
